Pro subscribers receive just $5/month in API credits, and heavy usage requires purchasing additional prepaid credits separately.
The newer Agentic Research API provides access to third-party models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and xAI at direct provider rates, with web search tool calls billed at $0.005 per invocation and URL fetches at $0.0005 per invocation.
For more information on managing and optimizing AI costs across your entire infrastructure — including Perplexity, OpenAI, Anthropic, and cloud providers — explore how Finout helps FinOps teams gain unified visibility and control over AI spend."},{"url":"https://www.eesel.ai/blog/perplexity-pricing","title":"Perplexity pricing in 2026: A complete guide for businesses | eesel AI","content":"Jun 23, 2026 — Perplexity has five consumer-and-business tiers in 2026: Free, Pro ($20/mo), Max ($200/mo), Enterprise Pro ($40/seat), and Enterprise Max ( ...Read more
This guide gives you a straight look at Perplexity pricing in 2026.
For $20 a month, you get extended Pro Search limits, access to top-tier models like GPT-5 and Claude Opus 4.6, image and video generation, file uploads, and access to the Comet browser agent.
Education Pro ($10/month): New for 2026, this is Pro at a discount for verified students and educators (via SheerID).
Enterprise Max (custom pricing): The top enterprise tier adds the highest access to advanced models like GPT-5 Thinking and Opus 4.6, far higher research and Comet limits, enhanced video generation, and premium security features (SCIM, audit logs, configurable data retention).
Price — $0 — $20/month — $200/month — from $40/user/month — Custom
Perplexity offers individual plans: Standard (Free), Pro ($20/month), and Max ($200/month), plus a discounted Education Pro plan ($10/month with student/educator verification).
Enterprise plans also start at $40/seat, so the per-user Perplexity pricing for teams is higher than the individual Pro tier."}]}
